events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the gauged fillet weld is undersized beyond AWS D1.1's allowable underrun (1/16 in, limited to 10% of weld length), which reduces the effective throat and load capacity of a structural connection — this is a **fail**, high risk, requiring NCR, gouge-and-rebuild repair per the qualified WPS, and re-inspection before cover-up.
